---
title: Add calendar export and sharing utilities
labels: [feature, frontend]
estimate: 1 day
---

Summary
- Provide iCal export and calendar URL generators (Google, Outlook) and activity-sharing endpoints.

Tasks
- Add `GET /activities/{id}/ical` and shareable link endpoints.
- Add frontend UI buttons to trigger calendar export and share copy.

Acceptance Criteria
- Calendar files/downloads work and share links are stable.
